infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SurviveKit needs your location to show where you are on the map and save locations.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: SurviveKit needs your location for navigation and offline use.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: SurviveKit uses the compass sensor to show your heading.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SurviveKit uses the camera to scan and store important documents offline.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SurviveKit accesses your photo library to save copies of important documents offline.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: SurviveKit saves document photos to your device.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: SurviveKit reads your emergency contact list to send SMS alerts when the Dead Man's Switch fires.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: SurviveKit needs your location for navigation and offline use.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: SurviveKit needs your location to show where you are on the map.

plugins.photosPermission: SurviveKit accesses your photo library to save copies of important documents offline.
plugins.cameraPermission: SurviveKit uses the camera to scan and store important documents offline.
SurviveKit uses the camera to scan QR codes from other family members' devices.
